## CheatReader v0.1.16

### Highlights
- Added customizable reader text colors with an automatic mode that still adapts to background opacity.
- Improved transparent mode readability with contrast-aware text shadows, so light desktop backgrounds remain usable.
- Added an in-app latest-version checker that can compare the current build with GitHub Releases and open the newest release page directly.

### Notes
- Refined the latest-version checker fallback path so temporary detection failures no longer block users at a generic error message.
- Existing reader settings and bookshelf data continue to work as before.
